newFindings.title: Governance-audit emission pattern duplicated across 5 sites without shared helper or action-string constants
evidenceRefs: 4 of 5 sites duplicate recordGovernanceAudit payload inline
action string 'tier_downgrade_non_constitutional_path' appears at 5 prod + 3 test bare literals with no enum
action string 'checkpoint_restore_excluded_path_rejected' appears at 1 prod + 1 test bare literal
memory-save uses '::_' anchor sentinel while other sites use conditional anchor — subtle drift already visible

P1-001.note: Wave-1 did not touch cleanup-script transaction boundary

P1-003.note: Zero realpathSync additions in any of the 5 Wave-1 files; guard sites inherit the same symlink vulnerability

P1-013-014.note: 3 parallel exclusion sources (EXCLUDED_FOR_MEMORY, SPEC_DOCUMENT_EXCLUDED_SEGMENTS, SPEC_DOC_EXCLUDE_DIRS) preserved; no 4th added, no unification

P1-015.note: Zero inline ADR back-references in any Wave-1 guard site

P1-pass2-004.rationale: Cleanup script was not explicitly named in Wave-1 scope; natural Wave-2 deferral
